concept: Sigma protocols; Schnorr; special soundness; proof of knowledge
label: Sigma protocols
assumed_background: interactive protocols with prover, verifier, and random challenge
commitment intuition: binding fixes a value before it is opened
basic group operations and exponent notation
learning_objectives: Describe the commit-challenge-response shape of a Sigma protocol.
Use two accepting transcripts with one commitment to extract the witness.
graphify_contribution: Graphify started from public-state sigma and Protostar special-sound nodes, not the Sigma-protocol concept; no graph edges were imported.
